title: ModrinthTotem
description:
changes the totem to the Modrinth logo

works on vanilla Minecraft
body:
Adds the Modrinth logo to the totem

works on Vanilla Minecraft does not require Optifine or any other mods

made for Minecraft 1.20.4 should work on older versions![Modrinth Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3e4dedf4c49fddfeb2ff789b31dcbb901c83126.png)


![Modrinth Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e02834058ef1359a7f427119c72dc868934d7688.png)
